source_docs_checked: Stripe/CDP x402 Bazaar docs via web_extract on 2026-06-23
indexing_requirements: Use CDP Facilitator verify/settle endpoint for x402 payments.
Attach Bazaar discovery metadata through extensions.bazaar / declareDiscoveryExtension on discoverable routes.
Ensure settle payload includes paymentPayload.resource for the exact payable resource URL.
Complete at least one successful settlement; verify-only is insufficient.
Expect cache/indexing delay and 30-day rolling activity filter.
implementation_todo: Wire DDG x402 provider verification/settlement through CDP Facilitator if not already using CDP settle.
Add a small route-to-Bazaar metadata map to the x402 verifier/edge layer.
On settle, include paymentPayload.resource equal to the exact public resource URL.
Inspect EXTENSION-RESPONSES header for rejected/processing and log only redacted status.
Run one penny settlement, then query CDP discovery search/resources for agents.daedalusdevelopmentgroup.com.
